name: Sally Yung
description:
Sally Yung was one of [Faye Valentine's](https://anilist.co/character/2) high school classmates.

Yung was a friend of Faye in the early 21st century. They made some videos which were recorded on beta cassette.

Yung would later marry, have children, and eventually grandchildren including [a girl](https://anilist.co/character/214420).

(Source: Cowboy Bebop Wikia)
